name: JEWETT CAMERON TRADING CO LTD
summary: Jewett-Cameron Trading Company Ltd. is a British Columbia-incorporated holding company operating through U.S. subsidiaries. It designs, sources, and distributes pet, fencing, and outdoor products (including patented Adjust-A-Gate and Fit-Right gate systems) under JCC; distributes specialty industrial wood products for transportation via Greenwood Products; and formerly processed agricultural seed through JCSC. Total sales were $41.3 million in fiscal 2025.
